name: aye4fin
description: Payment consulting and orchestration platform providing PSP integration and payments strategy services.

seo.title: aye4fin — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: aye4fin: Payment consulting and orchestration platform providing PSP integration and payments strategy services.

when_to_use: PSP integration consulting for merchants adding new payment processors
Payments orchestration strategy for enterprise platforms with multiple acquirers
Vendor selection and RFP support for payment infrastructure overhaul
Transaction routing optimization across existing PSP contracts

pros: Deep PSP integration expertise from payments consultants
Vendor-neutral advice on routing and acquirer selection
Helpful for RFPs and PSP commercial negotiations
cons: Small team limits scale of concurrent projects
Tech platform less mature than pure orchestrators
review.verdict: Useful as a payments consultancy, but do not expect a turnkey orchestration product like Primer or Payrails.
review.best_for: European enterprises running a PSP RFP or re-architecting a multi-acquirer setup.
review.not_for: Teams wanting a product they can integrate themselves without paid consulting engagements.
